attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
1 AS BATCH_ID,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
 XXOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID, 
 XXOA.ORDER_NUMBER, 
 XXOA.HEADER_ID, 
 XXOA.DATA_SOURCE, 
 XXOA.LINE_ID, 
 XXOA.PARENT_LINE_ID, 
 XXOA.ORDERED_ITEM, 
 XXOA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
 XXOA.ATTRIBUTION_FLAG , 
 XXOA.CISCO_BOOKED_FLAG,
 XXOA.BUNDLE_TYPE, 
 XXOA.QUANTITY, 
 XXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_LIST_PRICE, 
 XXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE, 
 XXOA.BOOKINGS_PCT, 
 XXOA.ATTRIBUTED_PCT, 
 XXOA.PUBLISH_FLAG, 
 XXOA.TRX_TYPE, 
 XXOA.CREATED_BY, 
 XXOA.CREATION_DATE, 
 XXOA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
 XXOA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
 XXOA.ORIG_OA_ATTRIB_ID,
 XXOA.COST_UNIT_PRICE,
  XXOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,
  XXOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE,
 XXOA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
 XXOA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 XXOA.REFRESH_DATETIME ,
 /*ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF  OFFER ATTRIBUTION Q2FY15*/
 XXOA.VERSION_ID ,
 XXOA.OBSOLETE_FLAG ,
 XXOA.EXCEPTION_CODE,
 XXOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE,
 XXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID,
 XXOA.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID,
 XXOA.MULTI_OA_BUNDLE_ENABLED,
 /*Added as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
 XXOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_NET_PRICE_LC,
 XXOA.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
 XXOA.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
 XXOA.CONVERSION_RATE 
FROM
/*$$NRTACCUMVWDB.DMP_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB XXOA*/		/*Commented as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXOA_ORDER_ATTRIB_WIPS XXOA		/*Added as part of SFP FY21 March Rel*/
WHERE XXOA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >='$$LastExtractDate' 
AND XXOA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE IN ( 'SQL COMPUPDATE','INSERT')
/* AND XXOA.ATTRIBUTION_CODE NOT IN ('DEAL ATTRIBUTED SUB SKU','DEAL OFFSET MULTI LEVEL SUB SKU') */ /* Commenting to allow AS ARCH SKUs Q1FY20 */
AND XXOA.PUBLISH_FLAG='Y'
/* XXOA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC IS ADDED IN ORDER BY CLAUSE - OA Q1FY15*/
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY XXOA.OA_ATTRIB_ID ORDER BY XXOA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME DESC,XXOA.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
